Loyal Steed amulet

Once in a while, the fighter gains a shield that absorbs 25% magic damage for 4 sec. Each time the shield blocks damage, the fighter's physical armor increases by 2000 for 4 sec. (Stacks up to 10 times).

Requirements: 98-100
